DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-22-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS STATE OF CALIFORNIA, EDMUND G. BROWN, JR, THE NATURAL RESOURCES AGENCY, AND THE CALIFORNIA ENVIRONMENTAL PROTECTION AGENCY'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

Appearances: Marc N. Melnick of the Attorney General's Office (510.622.2133) for defendant and moving party; Theodore Hadzi-Antich of the Pacific Legal Foundation (916.419.7111) appearing on behalf of intervenors; no other appearances.

The court modified its ruling as follows: sustained with thirty days leave to amend to allege, if the plaintiffs can do so in good faith, a sufficiently concrete dispute identifying one or more breaches of duty by a public officer or entity to make the action justiciable and not abstract or theoretical. Order signed in open court. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: Sonia Wong, CSR #11288
